overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a coastal village at dusk, transitioning from the harbor area through village outskirts with campfires and NPCs, and finally into a dense forest trail. The scene features medieval stone architecture, wooden harbor structures, and atmospheric blue-hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village street with harbor crane ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village street toward the harbor, passing wooden carts and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic walking ahead on the left side of the path

entered.detail: stone building with wooden beams and warm lit windows
tall wooden crane structure silhouetted against the sky at the harbor
wooden construction scaffolding along the right side of the path
wooden cart with wheels parked on the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow village street flanked by stone buildings and wooden structures. The path leads toward a large wooden harbor crane visible in the distance against the dusky sky. A villager in green walks ahead on the left, and wooden scaffolding lines the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor edge with beached longships and waterfront

events.description: exits narrow village street into open harbor area with view of water and beached ships
path curves right along the harbor edge, passing wooden docks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the harbor edge, passing wooden docks and beached longships

notable_agents.action: villager walking in same direction near the water's edge

entered.detail: large wooden longship with curved prow beached on the shore
calm water of the harbor inlet reflecting the dusky sky
low stone wall running along the right side of the harbor path
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to the harbor as Geralt exits the village street. A large Viking longship is beached on the shore to the center, with the harbor water extending into the distance. The wooden crane now appears on the left side as the path curves along the waterfront, bordered by a stone retaining wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with campfires, wooden barricades, and guards

events.description: passing by a lit campfire, warm orange light illuminates the scene contrasting with the blue dusk
leaving the village area and entering the forest trail, stone walls give way to trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village outskirts, passing guards and campfires near wooden barricades

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing by the wooden barricade
villager walking near the campfire light

entered.detail: small stone cottage with thatched roof and wooden door
burning campfire with bright orange flames and smoke
wooden fence and defensive barricade along the path
stack of cut wooden logs and timber

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through the village outskirts where the harbor gives way to a more fortified area with wooden barricades. A warm campfire burns on the left near a stone cottage, contrasting with the cool dusk light. Guards in red armor stand watch as the path begins to transition toward the forest, with trees becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pine trees and rocky outcrops

events.description: entering deeper forest with darker shade and denser tree cover blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the winding forest path, surrounded by tall pine trees and dense foliage

notable_agents.action: traveler in purple clothing walking in the opposite direction on the forest path

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees forming a dense forest canopy
large rocky boulders and outcrops among the trees
thick grass, bushes, and forest undergrowth along the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the dense forest as the village structures fall behind. The path winds through tall pine trees that block much of the remaining light, creating a darker, enclosed atmosphere. Rocky outcrops and thick undergrowth line the trail. A lone traveler passes by walking in the opposite direction as the forest grows denser deeper into the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow coastal village street into the depths of a dense, darkening forest. It begins by following Geralt through a corridor of stone buildings and wooden scaffolding, moving toward a large harbor crane silhouetted against the dusky sky. As the path opens up, the scene expands into a waterfront harbor featuring a beached Viking longship and a stone retaining wall that curves along the water. The environment then shifts toward the village outskirts, where the cool blue light of dusk contrasts with the warm glow of a campfire near wooden barricades and guards in red armor. Finally, the village structures fall away as the camera enters a thick pine forest, where the trail winds through rocky outcrops and undergrowth into an enclosed, shadowy atmosphere.
